title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
conditions: All players must have at least 19 HP
notes:
[gold]Multi-stage branching event[/gold] where you progressively venture deeper into a giant flower to extract increasingly valuable rewards, at the cost of cumulative HP damage.

The event has three decision points, each offering two choices:

[gold]Stage 1[/gold]: Extract 35 gold (safe) or reach deeper (5 HP damage).

[gold]Stage 2[/gold]: The petals are coated with a [purple]substance[/purple] that numbs pain. Extract 75 gold or reach even deeper (6 HP damage).

[gold]Stage 3[/gold]: The numbing becomes [red]throbbing weakness[/red]. Final choice: extract 135 gold or enter the center (7 HP damage + obtain [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold] relic).

Total HP damage for each path: Safe exit = 0 HP, +1 stage = 5 HP, +2 stages = 11 HP, all the way to center = 18 HP. Obtaining the Pollinous Core is the only way to get this relic from this event; the plant is destroyed in the process.
